news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

holdings.infoBox: HOYY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST HOOD ETF (HOYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) HOYY was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
